title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 11.9.2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 09/11/2021
Dry bulk rates drop back down to earth. - As volatility in the dry bulk space returned with a vengeance, so did potential trading
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Dry Bulk Shipping
November 9, 2021
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 2,227 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 2,718 Short-term Indicators:

↑ YTD: 126.0% ↑ YTD: 99.0% Sentiment: Neutral

Bi-Weekly Report
• Dry bulk rates drop back down to earth. - As volatility in the dry bulk space returned with a
vengeance, so did potential trading opportunities, and the last leg of this year's spectacular journey might prove a
great one.
